translations.en: I see the photo you took.
translations.fr: Je vois la photo que tu as prise.
translations.de: Ich sehe das Foto, das du gemacht hast.
translations.it: Vedo la foto che hai scattato.
translations.ru: Я вижу фотографию, которую ты сделал.
translations.pt: Vejo a foto que você tirou.
translations.vi: Tôi thấy bức ảnh bạn chụp.
translations.nl: Ik zie de foto die je hebt gemaakt.
translations.uk: Я бачу фото, яке ти зробив.
translations.hi: मैं वह तस्वीर देख रहा हूँ जो तुमने ली थी।
translations.id: Saya melihat foto yang kamu ambil.
translations.ro: Văd fotografia pe care ai făcut-o.
translations.ja: 君が撮った写真が見える。

tokens.explanation: Main finite verb in 1st person singular present indicative.
Definite article modifying the noun.
Common noun, singular, head of the noun phrase.
Relative pronoun introducing the subordinate clause and referring back to 'foto'.
Finite verb in 2nd person singular preterite indicative in the relative clause.

translations.en: Give me the book you have.
translations.fr: Donne-moi le livre que tu as.
translations.de: Gib mir das Buch, das du hast.
translations.ru: Дай мне книгу, которая у тебя есть.
translations.pt: Me dê o livro que você tem.
translations.he: תן לי את הספר שיש לך.
translations.vi: Đưa tôi cuốn sách bạn có.
translations.nl: Geef me het boek dat je hebt.
translations.uk: Дай мені книгу, яка в тебе є.
translations.hu: Add ide a könyvet, amid van.
translations.hi: मुझे वह किताब दो जो तुम्हारे पास है।
translations.el: Δώσε μου το βιβλίο που έχεις.
translations.id: Berikan saya buku yang kamu punya.
translations.ro: Dă-mi cartea pe care o ai.
translations.fi: Anna minulle kirja, joka sinulla on.
translations.ja: 君が持っている本をちょうだい。

tokens.explanation: Imperative verb with attached enclitic pronoun '-me'; treated as a single orthographic token.
Definite article modifying the noun.
Common noun, singular, head of the noun phrase.
Relative pronoun introducing the subordinate clause and referring back to 'libro'.
Finite verb in 2nd person singular present indicative in the relative clause.

sentences.target: Mi casa es la que ves.

translations.es: Mi casa es la que ves.
translations.en: My house is the one you see.
translations.fr: Ma maison est celle que tu vois.
translations.de: Mein Haus ist das, das du siehst.
translations.it: La mia casa è quella che vedi.
translations.ko: 내 집은 네가 보는 그 집이야.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的房子就是你看见的那一座。
translations.yue: 我間屋就係你見到嗰間。
translations.ru: Мой дом — тот, который ты видишь.
translations.pt: Minha casa é a que você vê.
translations.he: הבית שלי הוא זה שאתה רואה.
translations.vi: Nhà tôi là ngôi nhà bạn thấy.
translations.nl: Mijn huis is het huis dat je ziet.
translations.uk: Мій дім — той, який ти бачиш.
translations.hu: Az én házam az, amit látsz.
translations.hi: मेरा घर वही है जो तुम देखते हो।
translations.pl: Mój dom to ten, który widzisz.
translations.el: Το σπίτι μου είναι αυτό που βλέπεις.
translations.nb: Huset mitt er det du ser.
translations.id: Rumah saya adalah yang kamu lihat.
translations.sv: Mitt hus är det du ser.
translations.ro: Casa mea este cea pe care o vezi.
translations.cs: Můj dům je ten, který vidíš.
translations.da: Mit hus er det, du ser.
translations.ja: 私の家は君が見ているあれだ。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun.
Common noun, singular, head of the noun phrase.
Copular verb in 3rd person singular present indicative.
Definite article introducing the headless relative clause construction.
Relative pronoun introducing the subordinate clause and functioning as the clause's focal element.
Finite verb in 2nd person singular present indicative in the relative clause.

translations.en: I am looking for the dog that runs.
translations.fr: Je cherche le chien qui court.
translations.de: Ich suche den Hund, der läuft.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm con chó đang chạy.
translations.nl: Ik zoek de hond die rent.
translations.hi: मैं उस कुत्ते को ढूँढ रहा हूँ जो दौड़ रहा है।
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter hunden som løper.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter hunden som springer.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter hunden, der løber.
translations.ja: 走っている犬を探している。
